title: Sanji and Zoro Reach Their Limits
description: On pages 5–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Who’s-Who, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Yamato as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Who’s-Who
dialogue.text: Jinbe, what do you make of him?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's like he's a completely different person from the one who fought me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Being the man you are, it really fires you up, doesn't it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Challenging a man you've acknow- ledged.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What kind of person you are.

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: ACE!! You caused another disturbance in town!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shut up!! If I was stronger, they'd all be dead!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The demon's blood that flows within me...

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 26 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
